zh.Cheadle, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾黑阿德爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Chetwynd於1322年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾謝特德時，她的父親Reginald De Chetwynd31歲，母親Hawisia Vel Avista22歲。她於1340年與Richard de Pershale在英國史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於從1377年到1385年在英國。

zh-hans.Cheadle, Staffordshire, England: 英国斯塔福爾黑阿德爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Chetwynd于1322年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾謝特德时，她的父亲Reginald De Chetwynd31岁，母亲Hawisia Vel Avista22岁。她于1340年与Richard de Pershale在英国史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于从1377年到1385年在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Chetwynd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Chatwin
meanings: English (Warwickshire and Staffordshire): habitational name from a place in Shropshire called Chetwynd, from the Old English personal name Ceatta + Old English (ge)wind ‘winding ascent’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Chetwynd was born in 1322, in Chetwynd, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Reginald De Chetwynd, was 31 and her mother, Hawisia Vel Avista, was 22. She married Richard de Pershale in 1340, in Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died from 1377 to 1385, in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Chetwynd est née en 1322, à Chetwynd, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Reginald De Chetwynd, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Hawisia Vel Avista, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Richard de Pershale en 1340, à Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée du 1377 au 1385, à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Chetwynd 1322 in Chetwynd, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Reginald De Chetwynd 31 und ihre Mutter Hawisia Vel Avista 22. Sie hat 1340 in Shropshire, England Richard de Pershale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb von 1377 bis 1385 in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Chetwynd è nata il nel 1322 nel Chetwynd, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Reginald De Chetwynd, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Hawisia Vel Avista, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Richard de Pershale nel 1340, nel Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì da 1377 a 1385, nel England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Chetwyndが1322年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアチェトウインドで生まれた時，父Reginald De Chetwyndは31歳，母Hawisia Vel Avistaは22歳であった。1340年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアでRichard de Pershaleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女はから1377年まで1385年にイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Chetwynd(이)가 1322년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 쳇w이드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Reginald De Chetwynd(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hawisia Vel Avista(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1340년 영국 슈럽실르에서 Richard de Pershale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1377년 부터 1385년 까지 영국에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Chetwynd nasceu em 1322, em Chetwynd, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Reginald De Chetwynd, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Hawisia Vel Avista, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard de Pershale em 1340, em Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu de 1377 a 1385, em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Chetwynd родилась в 1322 г. в местности четвинд, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Reginald De Chetwynd было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Hawisia Vel Avista, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Pershale в 1340 г. в местности шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла с 1377 по 1385 в местности Англия.

sm.from 1377 to 1385: mai le 1377 e o'o I le 1385

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Chetwynd nació en 1322, en Chetwynd, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Reginald De Chetwynd, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Hawisia Vel Avista, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Richard de Pershale en 1340, en Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió desde 1377 hasta 1385, en Inglaterra.
